title: Dax update ✅🧐
author: ResearcherPitiful224
selftext:
*DAX UPDATE 👀*

*Dax is hovering around 24336 while writing the analysis.*
- Currently trading in a bullish channel support.

*Fundamentals  ✅*

- Easing euro is TARRIF deal is boosting German indice.
- ⁠Trump Zelensky meet and trio meet with a peace deal will surely boost the index.
- ⁠Rate cut probability and weaker us data will lead to euro strong and stronger index ultimately.
-
*TRADE IDEA 💡 DAX*
*BUY ABOVE 24385 with a clear ch-o-ch and ltf confirmation*

- *LQ sweep of equal lows possible !*
